description_long: This is a modern tracked combat vehicle with a low, angular profile and a long, forward-mounted cannon. The exterior is covered in a digital camouflage pattern composed of green, gray, and black rectangular shapes, providing visual disruption. The vehicle features a turret with a prominent main gun, two tall communication antennas at the rear, and several hatches and equipment mounts on the roof. The sides are protected by modular armor panels, and the running gear consists of multiple road wheels and continuous tracks for all-terrain mobility. The rear section includes additional storage compartments and exhaust outlets. The overall design emphasizes protection, firepower, and urban operational capability.
description: A modern tracked combat vehicle with digital camouflage, a long cannon, modular armor, and roof-mounted antennas.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the cannon, modular side armor, and the arrangement of road wheels and tracks.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the angular turret, main gun, and the two tall antennas at the rear.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same modular armor and track system, with clearer visibility of the turret's rear details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the turret, antennas, and rear storage compartments.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon mounted on the turret front, with a possible secondary mount on the turret roof; two tall antennas at the rear.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with modular, sloped armor panels on the sides and turret; armor appears thick and robust, especially around the front and turret.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Digital camouflage pattern with green, gray, and black rectangular shapes in a pixelated style.
